strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke employment+debt reality se jodna aur worth separate karna.
text: Job threat ke saath EMI aur family debt ka pressure ho toh panic feel karna bilkul natural hai. Tumhari keemat is moment ke breakdown se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda sa halka hua, par kal ka thought aate hi phir se heart race karta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se shame/panic normalize karna.
text: Family earner roles mein yeh pattern bahut common hai ki job scare ke baad panic body pe chadh jata hai, sirf tumhara nahi, lekin log bolte nahi kyunki unhe lagta hai provider ko kabhi hilna nahi chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon? Mujhe immediate kuch chahiye jisse kal tak stable rahun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 low-burden options dena jo duty-compatible hon.
text: Teen quick options: (1) 4 minute slow breathing, (2) kal ka first 20-minute task note karo, (3) EMI due-date list ek line mein likh do taaki mind ko anchor mile.

speaker: Seeker
text: Second aur third doable lag rahe, task note karunga aur EMI dates likh leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko step-by-step execute karwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo aur heading likho "Kal first block + EMI". Phir ek kaam likho jo kal 20 min mein karna hai. Phir EMI ki next due date likh ke reminder set karo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, likh diya. Thoda control aa gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Employment-debt stress ka structural reframe dena.
text: Jab job insecurity aur household debt overlap karte hain, panic spikes hona common system response hai; yeh personal weakness ka verdict nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, saans ab normal lag rahi hai pehle se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress acknowledge karna aur self-agency reinforce karna.
text: Yeh strong shift hai, tum panic wave se structure pe aa gaye ho. Yeh tumhari practical strength dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meeting yaad aate hi trigger hota
text: Bas meeting yaad aate hi trigger ho jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Trigger moment ke liye 3 fast options dena.
text: Trigger ke waqt yeh teen cheezein: (1) 30 sec long exhale, (2) line bolo "Give me a minute to pull the data", (3) baad mein 2 factual points note karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, woh line kaam aayegi. Main theek hona chahta hoon bina phir se toot ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second structural reframe se self-blame reduce karna.
text: Financial uncertainty ke phase mein brain survival mode mein chala jata hai, isi liye soch narrow ho jati hai; yeh ability ki kami nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh samajh ke ab utna doobta hua feel nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability ko name karke confidence consolidate karna.
text: Tumne panic ko ignore nahi kiya, uske saath workable plan banaya, yeh real progress hai.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: In-the-moment response scripts ke 3 compact options dena.
text: Us moment pe: (1) neutral line "Noted, I will share update by EOD", (2) voice slow rakhkar sirf facts bolo, (3) call ke baad incident ko 3 bullets mein capture karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Noted, yeh script manageable lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prepared response ko reinforce karna aur dignity protect karna.
text: Yeh clear aur composed response hai, aur tumhari self-respect ko intact rakhta hai. Tum ready ho.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar liya, ab settled feel ho raha aur saans bhi normal hai.

speaker: Supporter
